name: emergency_escalation
description: Sends an urgent SMS to the workshop owner or designated emergency contact when a caller describes a safety-critical vehicle issue — brake failure, steering loss, smoke/fire, or any situation requiring immediate human intervention. Ensures no urgent call gets lost in the booking flow.
el_call_timing: Invoke when the caller uses words like: brakes failed, steering gone, smoke, fire, leaking fuel, not safe to drive, accident, tow truck needed, stuck on the road
notes: This is the simplest buildable tool — one Twilio SMS to a stored phone number. The agent must still be helpful and empathetic before ending the call. After sending the alert, agent should say: 'I've flagged this as urgent and the team will call you back as soon as possible. If you're in immediate danger, please call 000.' Do not offer booking slots for safety-critical situations.
